rows.label: tev023501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev023501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Berry about NLA.

rows.label: tev023501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev023501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Berry if she has any interesting news.

rows.label: tev023501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Berry about Mira's oceans.

rows.label: tev023501_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Berry about the Earthlife Colonization Project.

rows.label: tev023501_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Berry about the city of NLA.

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0001
rows.name:
NLA was nearly complete when we were
forced to crash-land here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0002
rows.name:
Those damned xenoforms couldn't
wait just a little while longer?
Ugh! How I loathe them...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0003
rows.name:
Anyway, that's why the roads are only
partially finished and lack side barriers
to keep people from falling off.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0004
rows.name:
I hear someone once fell all the
way to the bottom! Took a whole
team of Companion to rescue him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0005
rows.name:
That reminds me: Kaisis offered to escort
me home that day, but I refused. I could
tell he had some ulterior motive in mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0008
rows.name:
Oh, you missed quite the
brouhaha here the other day![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0009
rows.name:
Once again, Kaisis was insisting
that I let him escort me home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0010
rows.name:
But I could tell he had something
else in mind, so I flatly refused.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0011
rows.name:
Just then, a Companion named Tracy came
by and mistakenly assumed from our
conversation that he was trying to abduct me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0012
rows.name:
Then she slapped a set of handcuffs
on him and tried to lead him away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0013
rows.name:
No matter what Kaisis said, she wouldn't
listen. She said her "detective's instincts"
made it clear that this was an abduction.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0014
rows.name:
Honestly, she seems a little
bit...unstable. I hope she doesn't
cause a more serious problem someday...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0020
rows.name:
Sometimes I log on to research
data probes to look at the views
from the Miran coastlines.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0021
rows.name:
And on rare occasions, I spot
small islands on the horizon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0022
rows.name:
I wonder if those sorts of islands are
scattered throughout Mira's seas?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0023
rows.name:
I can't imagine many BLADEs have even
tried to visit such isolated places.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0024
rows.name:
So if you were to work up the courage
to swim out there, who knows what
sort of treasure you might find?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0026
rows.name:
A great many ships were launched as
part of the Earthlife Colonization
Project. I wonder if the others are safe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0027
rows.name:
I mean, what if the Growth
found them and destroyed them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0028
rows.name:
...No, I'm sure they're okay. We probably
haven't heard from them because they haven't
yet found a suitable planet on which to land.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0029
rows.name:
I need to toughen up. It's because
of these moments of weakness that
Kaisis has such designs on me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0035
rows.name:
I've been complaining to the maintenance
teams about how easy it is to fall here
because of the insufficient guard rails.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0036
rows.name:
But I must admit, it makes me a
little sad to think about them
filling in the ground eventually.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0037
rows.name:
Hmmm... Maybe before they block
it off, I should take Kaisis
to see the water below.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0038
rows.name:
He always seems like he has something
to say, but he just won't spit it out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023501_MSG0039
rows.name:
He keeps saying he'll tell me once the
city is finished, but nuts to that!
I'm just going to make him tell me![ST:wait ]
